title: gladiolus segetum var. bornetii
intro: Gladiolus segetum var. bornetii, also known as the gladiolus or corn flag lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
